ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental sample */,
  "sample_code" TEXT /* Code representing the sample */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date and time when the sample was collected */,
  "cpm" REAL /* Counts Per Minute (CPM) value for the sample */,
  "percentage_error" REAL /* Percentage error associated with the measurement */,
  "lumex_percentage" REAL /* Lumex percentage value for the sample */,
  "elapsed_time" REAL /* Elapsed time in seconds during which the sample was analyzed */,
  "sample_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sample */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sample was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collector of the sample */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment used for collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_sample_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_type_id") REFERENCES sample_types ("sample_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., CPM, Lumex percentage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., counts/minute, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_types" (
  "sample_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample type */,
  "sample_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample type (e.g., air, water, soil) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username used for logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the collector */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the collector (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings from the sample analysis */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample associated with the report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username used for logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the analyst (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username used for logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation check */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation check */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is valid or not */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the validation */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the validator who performed the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validators" (
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username used for logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the validator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the validator (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "collection_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample that caused the error */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date when the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error encountered */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., syntax, runtime) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
